payload.answer: Conflict detected. Existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. I did not commit the new fact to durable memory because it conflicts and may refer to the same or a different Sara.

entity_resolution.reason: The new input uses the same name, Sara, but asserts a conflicting family relationship. This could be the same person with contradictory facts or a different person sharing the same name. Durable memory should not be updated without disambiguation.

details: Detected a conflict between existing and new family-relationship claims.
Preserved ambiguity because the identity of Sara is not fully resolved.

repair_options: Clarify whether this is the same Sara or a different Sara.
If different, provide a disambiguator such as last name, age, or another identifying detail.
If the old memory was incorrect, explicitly say to replace 'Sara is my daughter' with 'Sara is my niece.'
